pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to the latest patch release.
Upgrade the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping java.version at 17 would result in the application being compiled for an older bytecode version, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if strict JDK 21 enforcement is desired.

src/main/resources/static/css/styles..cs.general_idea: Overhauled the CSS stylesheet to implement a modern green-themed UI with flexbox layout, gradients, and component styling.

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Add main content section with user welcome area and navigation buttons to the static HTML page.
src/main/resources/static/index.html.after:

src/main/resources/static/index.html.general_idea: Add footer section with copyright information to the static HTML page.
